Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/YatCC/task/2/common/Typing.cpp:
     1	#include "Typing.hpp"
     2	#include <cassert>
     3	
     4	#define self (*this)
     5	
     6	namespace asg {
     7	
     8	TranslationUnit*
     9	Typing::operator()(TranslationUnit* tu)
    10	{
    11	  for (auto&& i : tu->decls)
    12	    self(i);
    13	  return tu;
    14	}
    15	
    16	//==============================================================================
    17	// 表达式
    18	//==============================================================================
    19	
    20	Expr*
    21	Typing::operator()(Expr* obj)
    22	{
    23	  if (auto p = obj->dcst<IntegerLiteral>())
    24	    return self(p);
    25	
    26	  if (auto p = obj->dcst<StringLiteral>())
    27	    return self(p);
    28	
    29	  if (auto p = obj->dcst<DeclRefExpr>())
    30	    return self(p);
